caveats: Raw sample corpora and full simulation outputs are not committed, so this sidecar supports plot reproduction from summary data, not rerunning the publication-scale simulations.
code_version: Source checkout version was not recorded in the source summary table.

Delta.definition: Imported plot-ready summary column from the source artifact.

K.definition: Imported plot-ready summary column from the source artifact.

bad_ranking.definition: Imported plot-ready summary column from the source artifact.

ci_high.definition: Wilson 95% interval upper endpoint when paired with ci_low.

ci_low.definition: Wilson 95% interval lower endpoint when paired with ci_high.

decoder.definition: Imported plot-ready summary column from the source artifact.

exception_fail.definition: decoder exception failure count in the full-frame decomposition.

fail_total.definition: number of failed full logical frames.

fer.definition: full logical frame error rate, fail_total/trials when those columns are present.

fer_per_round.definition: Imported plot-ready summary column from the source artifact.

logical_fail.definition: logical failure count in the full-frame decomposition.

logical_rows.definition: Imported plot-ready summary column from the source artifact.

matrix_cols.definition: number of detector/model columns in the decoded matrix.

matrix_rows.definition: number of detector/check rows in the decoded matrix.

mean_transition_evals.definition: mean transition-evaluation work per decoded frame.

paper_reference: fig:bb72_dem_circuit; frontier_decoder2.tex lines 680-688; rendered PDF candidate Frontier_decoder-2.pdf sha256 1406a80c7448f6964634da42d4f520b0cf03f97b60899034ac2aff1219cb29c5

paper_source.note: No literal frontier_decoder2(2).tex file was present in the working environment; Frontier_decoder-2.pdf is the newest available rendered PDF candidate.

raw_corpus.notes: This repository commits compact plot-ready summary data only; raw per-shot corpora or full run outputs are not included.

source_artifact_note: Local/source artifact label normalized for provenance; not a public DOI or archive identifier.
source_command: Plot data copied from an existing compact summary artifact; committed renderer listed in the renderer field regenerates the paper plot output from this CSV.
